name: Navy
description: The Imperial Navy — the interstellar military forces that maintain order between worlds and defend the Imperium from external threats.

line_crew.name: Line/Crew
line_crew.description: You serve on the deck of an Imperial warship.

engineer_gunner.name: Engineer/Gunner
engineer_gunner.description: You operate the ship's drives or weapons.

flight.name: Flight
flight.description: You pilot small craft, fighters, and shuttles launched from a capital ship.

mishaps.1: Severely injured in action (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: Your ship is destroyed in a battle, misjump or accident. You are one of the few survivors. Gain a fellow survivor as a Contact.
mishaps.3: You are disgraced by the actions of your ship, your captain, or yourself. Gain a Rival in the service.
mishaps.4: You are court-martialled for a real or imagined offence. Whether or not you are convicted, you are forced out of the service.
mishaps.5: A political scandal or shift in Imperial policy ends your career. Gain an Enemy among the admiralty.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: Your ship engages an enemy vessel. Roll Gunner 8+ or Tactics (naval) 8+; on success, gain one of Gunner 1 or Tactics (naval) 1 and DM+1 to your next Advancement roll. On failure, roll on the Mishap Table (not ejected).
events.4: You are assigned to an isolated, long-range patrol. Gain one of Astrogation 1, Survival 1, Electronics 1 or Vacc Suit 1.
events.5: You are given a commendation. Gain DM+1 to any one Benefit roll.
events.6: You serve aboard a ship with an excellent captain. Gain them as a Contact or Ally.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: You are sent to officer training or specialist school. Roll EDU 8+ to gain any one skill from the Officer or Advanced Education tables at level 1.
events.9: You distinguish yourself in a ship-to-ship engagement. Gain DM+2 to your next Advancement roll.
events.10: You are transferred to an elite unit. Gain one of Gun Combat 1, Melee (blade) 1, Vacc Suit 1 or Leadership 1, or transfer to the Marines without a Qualification roll.
events.11: You are given advanced training in a specialist field. Gain one level in any skill you already have, or DM+4 to your next Advancement roll.
events.12: Your heroism in a major fleet action is noted by the Imperial court. You are automatically promoted and gain a medal.
